title: Verify linear pace formula and states
preconditions: Fixtures cover each calendar month length, each elapsed day, non-zero, zero and absent plans, positive, zero and negative actuals, not-started periods, and exact boundary equality.
steps: Compute exact rational baselines and classify below, at, above, over-plan, over-zero-plan, at-or-below-zero-plan, and unavailable cases; inspect limitations and daily/weekly outputs.
expected: Formula, exact comparison, division-free zero-plan behavior, named states, and non-forecast explanation match FR-INSIGHTS-LINEAR-PACE with no invented sub-budgets.
